Reentrancy in PayrollPlugin._runPayroll(uint256,bool) (src/plugins/payroll/PayrollPlugin.sol#281-391):
	External calls:
	- (None,failureMap) = IExecutor(address(dao())).execute(keccak256(bytes)(abi.encodePacked(PAYROLL:,currentPeriod,:,start)),actions,allowFailureMap) (src/plugins/payroll/PayrollPlugin.sol#380-384)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- KeeperBountyPaid(msg.sender,bountyToken,bountyAmount,currentPeriod) (src/plugins/payroll/PayrollPlugin.sol#388)
	- PayrollExecuted(currentPeriod,count,failureMap) (src/plugins/payroll/PayrollPlugin.sol#386)
	- PayrollPeriodCompleted(currentPeriod) (src/plugins/payroll/PayrollPlugin.sol#390)
